title: International Regulations for Preventing Collisions at Sea (COLREG)
summary: COLREG rules of the road. Covers: lookout, safe speed, risk of collision, give-way and stand-on vessels, crossing/overtaking/head-on situations, restricted visibility conduct, lights, shapes, fog signals, sound and light signals.

title: BR 45 Volume 2 – Celestial Navigation
summary: UK Royal Navy celestial navigation. Covers: celestial sphere theory, sight reduction, sun/star/planet sights, altitude and azimuth calculations, sight planning, nautical almanac, intercept method, running fixes, compass errors by celestial observation.

title: BR 45 Volume 3 – Coastal and Ocean Navigation
summary: UK Royal Navy coastal and ocean navigation. Covers: chart work, position fixing, tidal calculations, current and leeway, passage planning, ocean routing, waypoints, buoyage, pilotage, position lines, fixes by bearings and transits, ECDIS.

title: BR 45 Volume 4 – Radar Navigation and Watchkeeping
summary: UK Royal Navy radar operations and navigational watchkeeping. Covers: radar principles, blind arcs, off-centring, guard zones, sector transmission, pulse length, radar plotting, ARPA, collision avoidance using radar, OOW duties, radar in restricted visibility, target tracking, close-quarters situations.

title: BR 45 Volume 5 – Navigation in Ice and Special Conditions
summary: UK Royal Navy navigation in ice, shallow water, and special conditions. Covers: ice navigation, polar operations, shallow water effects, anchor work, towing, replenishment at sea navigation, and special seamanship evolutions.

title: BR 45 Volume 6 – Electronic Navigation Systems
summary: UK Royal Navy electronic navigation systems. Covers: GPS, GNSS, ECDIS operation, AIS (Automatic Identification System), integrated navigation, electronic chart display, system failures, fallback procedures, and navigation data management.

title: BR 45 Volume 7 – Navigation Publications and References
summary: UK Royal Navy navigation publications, corrections, and references. Covers: Notices to Mariners, chart corrections, publication maintenance, hydrographic office references, navigational warnings, and management of navigational documents.
